data.title: Defence Therapeutics Launches $1.2 Million Debenture Units Financing
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Defence Therapeutics ( (TSE:DTC) ) has shared an update.

Defence Therapeutics Inc. has announced a non-brokered private placement of debenture units to raise up to $1.2 million. The financing involves convertible debentures and common share purchase warrants, which will help the company strengthen its financial position and support its ongoing biotechnology initiatives. The offering is subject to regulatory approvals and includes conditions such as a statutory hold period for securities issued.

Spark’s Take on TSE:DTC Stock

According to Spark, TipRanks’ AI Analyst, TSE:DTC is a Underperform.

Defence Therapeutics faces significant financial challenges with no revenue and high losses. While recent corporate events show promise for strategic direction, the overall financial health and valuation are concerning. Technical indicators provide mixed signals with potential long-term recovery but weak near-term momentum.

To see Spark’s full report on TSE:DTC stock, click here.

More about Defence Therapeutics

Defence Therapeutics is a publicly-traded clinical-stage biotechnology company focused on developing and engineering next-generation ADC products using its proprietary ACCUM technology. This platform enhances the precision delivery of ADCs to target cells, increasing efficacy and potency against cancer.

Average Trading Volume: 48,405

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

(CBOE: FGX), set at $0.024 per share, with key dates including an ex-dividend date of August 29, 2025, and a payable date of September 15, 2025. This announcement highlights the ongoing financial operations of Faircourt Gold Income Corp., offering insights into the fund’s performance and potential implications for investors, particularly in terms of brokerage fees and the fluctuating nature of investment fund values.

Faircourt Asset Management Inc. operates in the financial services industry, focusing on investment management. data.description:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Lum Chang Holdings Limited ( (SG:L19) ) has issued an update.

Lum Chang Holdings Limited has announced a joint venture with L&K Engineering Co., Ltd’s Singapore branch to undertake a project in the northern region of Singapore. The joint venture, named L&K-LCB Joint Venture LLP, will focus on civil, structural, and architectural works, with Lum Chang holding a 30% stake and L&K holding 70%. This collaboration is expected to enhance Lum Chang’s market presence and operational capacity in the construction sector.

More about Lum Chang Holdings Limited

Lum Chang Holdings Limited operates in the construction industry, providing civil, structural, and architectural services. The company focuses on projects primarily in Singapore and is involved in various construction and engineering activities through its subsidiaries.

data.title: Ørsted’s Revolution Wind Project Faces Regulatory Halt
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An update from Orsted ( (DOGEF) ) is now available.

Ørsted’s Revolution Wind project, a joint venture with Global Infrastructure Partner’s Skyborn Renewables, received a stop-work order from the US Department of the Interior’s Bureau of Ocean Energy Management, halting offshore activities. The project, which is 80% complete, aims to provide significant power to Rhode Island and Connecticut. Ørsted is exploring options to resolve the issue, including legal proceedings, and assessing the financial implications, with further announcements expected regarding the impact on their strategic plans.

More about Orsted

Ørsted is a global leader in renewable energy, focusing on the development, construction, and operation of offshore and onshore wind farms, solar farms, energy storage facilities, and bioenergy plants. Headquartered in Denmark, Ørsted is recognized for its commitment to climate action and has a validated net-zero emissions target. The company employs approximately 8,300 people and is listed on Nasdaq Copenhagen.

Auscan Resources ( ($TSE:ACR.H) ) has shared an announcement.

Auscan Resources Inc. has successfully closed a private placement financing, raising a total of $238,800 through the issuance of 1,500,000 units. The proceeds will be used for general working capital purposes. data.title: Oceanic Wind Energy Reports Q3 Financial Results, Highlights Cash Increase
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

An announcement from Oceanic Wind Energy ( ($TSE:NKW.H) ) is now available.

Oceanic Wind Energy Inc. reported its financial results for the third quarter ending June 30, 2025, highlighting a significant increase in cash reserves to $143,133, up from $13,448 in September 2024. This improvement is attributed to proceeds from the sale of its subsidiary, NaiKun Wind Development Inc. Despite this, the company incurred a net loss of $110,833 for the quarter, slightly higher than the previous year’s loss of $100,402, indicating ongoing financial challenges. The sale of the subsidiary and the subsequent cash inflow are expected to impact the company’s financial stability positively, although the net loss suggests that the company is still navigating financial hurdles.

More about Oceanic Wind Energy

Oceanic Wind Energy Inc. operates in the renewable energy industry, focusing on wind energy projects. The company is involved in the development and management of wind energy resources, aiming to contribute to sustainable energy solutions.

data.title: Badlands Resources to Acquire Rett Claims in Thunder Bay
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

The latest update is out from Mineral Mountain Resources ( (TSE:BLDS) ).

Badlands Resources Inc., a company listed on the TSX Venture Exchange, has entered into an option agreement to acquire the Rett Property, consisting of 91 unpatented mining claims in Thunder Bay, Ontario. This acquisition could potentially expand Badlands’ exploration activities in a region known for its rich deposits of platinum group metals, copper, nickel, and rare-element pegmatites. The transaction is contingent upon approval from the TSX Venture Exchange, and further share issuance is dependent on the demonstration of significant mineral resources.

data.title: Domestic Metals Corp. Announces Webinar on Strategic Developments
data.description:
Elevate Your Investing Strategy:

  • Take advantage of TipRanks Premium at 50% off! Unlock powerful investing tools, advanced data, and expert analyst insights to help you invest with confidence.

Domestic Metals ( (TSE:DMCU) ) has provided an update.

Domestic Metals Corp. has announced a corporate update webinar scheduled for August 28, 2025, to discuss recent developments and plans for their Smart Creek Project in Montana. The company aims to capitalize on the current U.S. demand for critical minerals, particularly copper, amid domestic production shortages and new import tariffs. The Smart Creek Project is highlighted for its potential to host a significant orebody, supported by promising exploration data, which could enhance Domestic Metals’ position in the mining industry.

More about Domestic Metals

Domestic Metals Corp. is a mineral exploration company focused on discovering large-scale copper and gold deposits in historical mining project areas across the Americas. The company targets economically favorable grades indicated by historic drilling and sampling in geologically attractive mining jurisdictions, with a strategic focus on the Smart Creek Project in Montana.
